summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TutorIA AI tutor app for primary school children. Major ObjectId issue from previous iteration has been RESOLVED. Claude AI integration working correctly. Most functionality operational with 2 minor backend issues identified.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 401 when no authentication provided
minor_bugs.impact: Minor security concern - should return 401 for unauthorized access

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 520 Internal Server Error when creating check-in
minor_bugs.impact: Daily mood check-in feature not working from API

working_endpoints: /api/exercises/generate - AI exercise generation with Claude (FIXED from previous iteration)
/api/chat/{child_id} - AI tutor chat with Claude API

working_features: Landing page with proper branding and subject pills
Parent dashboard with child management and progress visualization
Child dashboard with mood check-in flow
Practice mode with subject selection and AI-generated exercises
Exercise submission and result display with immediate feedback
AI tutor chat with Claude integration responding intelligently
Progress tracking with weekly stats and subject breakdowns
Navigation between all pages working smoothly
Responsive design elements and proper styling

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all elements and subject pills
Google Auth button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
API root endpoint returns correct response
API skills endpoint returns comprehensive skills data
Session-based authentication with existing test credentials
Parent dashboard loads and displays child information
Child dashboard with mood check-in functionality
Practice mode generates AI exercises using Claude API
Exercise options display and submission works correctly
AI tutor chat responds intelligently using Claude
Navigation between parent and child dashboards
Weekly stats and subject progress visualization
All interactive buttons and forms functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Two minor backend issues: 1) Fix /api/children endpoint to return 401 for unauthorized access instead of 200, 2) Fix /api/checkin/{child_id} endpoint returning 520 error when creating check-ins. Both are low-medium priority as core functionality works well.
